# `src/client/generated`

**AUTO-GENERATED. Do not hand-edit.**

| Source | Reproduces |
|---|---|
| `specs/typespec/backend/main.tsp` | endpoint_manifest.rs: the BACKEND_ENDPOINT_MANIFEST array enumerating every backend HTTP operation |
